name: Bitter Leaf Soup (Ofe Onugbu)
intro: To wash bitter leaves: place the leaves in a large bowl and cover with warm water. Use your hands to scrub and squeeze the leaves. You will start to see some foam developing and the water will turn a dark green colour. Use a sieve to strain out the water, rinse the leaves and return to the bowl. Repeat the washing process 5-6 times until the foaming reduces and the water starts to run clear. Squeeze the leaves and chop to desired size.

ingredients.item: meat alternatives (such as seitan, mushrooms or chopped tofu)
bitter leaves (washed multiple times and finely chopped)

method: Heat the palm oil in a large pot and add the sliced onions. Fry for 2-3 minutes until the onions start to soften.
Add the pepper sauce, water, vegetable stock cube, iru/ ogiri and ground egusi. Bring to a boil, then simmer on medium heat for 15 minutes.
Add the meat alternatives and bitter leaves. Stir well to combine and season with salt to taste. Simmer on medium heat for another 5 minutes.
